heavy_rain_slippery_pitch.description: Playing in heavy rain or on an excessively watered pitch.
tactical_impacts: Ball slides much faster on the surface, increasing the probability of goalkeeper handling errors.
High-risk short passing in own third; possession-heavy teams (Tiki-Taka) struggle with accuracy and must play safer.
Favors direct counter-attacking and long-range shooting styles.
Increased risk of sliding tackle foul cards due to poor traction.

statistical_impacts.shots_from_distance: Increased volume, higher shot-on-target conversion rate due to slippery ball.
statistical_impacts.total_fouls: Elevated by 15% - 20% due to late sliding challenges.

extreme_heat_and_humidity.description: Temperatures exceeding 32°C (90°F) or high relative humidity.
tactical_impacts: Rapid depletion of player stamina, especially past the 60th minute.
High-intensity pressing styles (Gegenpress) become highly risky and unsustainable for 90 minutes.
Favors possession-based, slow-tempo teams who run the ball rather than themselves, preserving energy.
Managers forced to use all 5 substitutions earlier to maintain energy levels.

statistical_impacts.match_tempo: Significant decline in sprint frequencies in the second half.
statistical_impacts.second_half_goals: Higher late goal probability due to defender fatigue and lapses in concentration.

strict_card_happy_referee.description: Referee with a high historical card-per-game ratio (e.g., > 4.5 yellows/game, high red card frequency).
tactical_impacts: Forces physical, aggressive pressing teams to tone down their tackling intensity.
Favors technical dribblers who draw fouls easily.
Defenders must drop deeper to avoid committing professional fouls in 1v1 situations.

statistical_impacts.expected_cards: Significantly elevated yellow and red card projections.
statistical_impacts.set_piece_frequency: Higher count of free kicks awarded in dangerous areas.

lenient_let_play_referee.description: Referee who permits physical contact and rarely stops the match for minor collisions.
tactical_impacts: Favors highly physical, compact defensive low blocks and pressing teams.
Technical playmakers are frequently disrupted, leading to frustration and loss of possession.
Slowing down the match transition as fewer fouls are awarded to relieve pressure.

statistical_impacts.expected_cards: Lower card projection, higher threshold for yellow cards.

midweek_continental_travel_fatigue.description: Playing a midweek European/continental match (e.g., UCL, UEL) with long-distance travel, followed by a weekend domestic league game.
tactical_impacts: Heavy squad rotation in the weekend domestic match to rest key players.
Lower physical intensity and pressing capability during the opening 30 minutes of the weekend match.
Vulnerability to high-energy, rested opponents who had a full week of preparation.

statistical_impacts.first_half_concession: Higher probability of conceding early goals due to sluggish starts.

extreme_hostile_stadium_crowd.description: Away team playing in a highly vocal, high-pressure stadium (e.g., Turkish or South American hostile atmospheres).
tactical_impacts: Subconscious referee bias toward the home team (higher home foul tolerance).
Away team communication breakdown due to crowd noise, leading to defensive misunderstanding.
Boost in home team physical intensity and high press driven by crowd momentum in the first 15 minutes.

statistical_impacts.home_team_momentum: Home team dominates possession and shots in the opening 15-20 minutes.
statistical_impacts.away_defensive_errors: Increased rate of unforced turnovers and miscommunication clearances by away defenders.

key_deep_playmaker_injury.description: In-match injury to the team's primary deep-lying playmaker (Regista/DLP).
tactical_impacts: Immediate breakdown of the team's build-up phase; struggle to progress the ball from defense to midfield.
Team forced to play longer, direct clearances, surrendering possession control.

statistical_impacts.possession_percentage: Drops by 10% - 15% for the remainder of the match.

central_defender_injury_sub.description: In-match injury to a starting central center-back, forcing a mid-game substitution.
tactical_impacts: Loss of defensive line synchronization and offside trap coordination.
Set-piece defensive organization is temporarily disrupted while the substitute settles.

statistical_impacts.concession_risk: Highly elevated goal concession risk in the 10 minutes immediately following the substitution.
statistical_impacts.set_piece_concession: Increased vulnerability to aerial set-piece goals.
